index.title: Branding
index.description: Applies to every one of your tenant's public pages — subscription, preference, archive, and the standalone campaign pages.

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.description: You need the branding:manage permission to view this page.

logoColor.title: Logo and color
logoColor.description: A logo and primary color shown at the top of every public page.
logoColor.logoUrlHint: Use an image from your Media library or any public URL.

customCss.title: Custom CSS
customCss.description: Applied to every public page. Markup that could escape or run scripts is removed by the server.
